arts.ttl: Ex-Man Utd, Portugal winger Nani retires
arts.sum: Former Portugal winger Nani, who won four Premier League titles and the Champions League with Manchester United, announced his retirement from professional football.

arts.ttl: Preview: Estrela Amadora vs. Arouca - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Monday's Primeira Liga clash between Estrela Amadora and Arouca, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
